title: task
description: fragment.rs:527 - In FragmentReceiver::receive(), the calculation 'self.window_size - 1 - frag.fcn as usize' underflows when FCN > window_size - 1 for non-All-1 fragments. A malformed or malicious fragment with FCN outside the valid range (e.g., FCN=10 with window_size=7) causes integer underflow in release builds (wrapping to huge index) or panic in debug builds. The fragment is then stored with a bogus global_idx in the HashMap, corrupting reassembly state. Fix: validate FCN < window_size for non-All-1 fragments before computing pos, or use checked/saturating arithmetic.
close_reason: Verified: FCN bounds check already in place at line 527-535. Test receiver_ignores_fcn_exceeding_window_size confirms fix.
